subcodes.first_line: The Book which hath been sent down in truth from before God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, it maketh known unto men the Dawning-Place of divine inspiration and guideth them [3.5s]... ...Say: He hath appeared with that Justice wherewith mankind hath been adorned, and yet the people are, for the most part, asleep
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله رب العالمین انه یعرف الناس مطلع الالهام و یهدیهم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
